source_pr.title: session: add session scope for tidb_enable_clustered_index
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: To keep consistent between v5.0 and v5.0-rc, we should reserve the session scope of variable `tidb_enable_clustered_index`.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

Add bootstrap version 68, upgrade the global variable `tidb_enable_clustered_index` value from `OFF` to `INT_ONLY`.

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:!
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch!

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

NA

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The only available signal is a vague note about an unstable failpoint test, while the PR itself mainly changes the scope/bootstrapping behavior of `tidb_enable_clustered_index`. The patch does not include a clear flaky failure signature or enough evidence to confidently attribute a root cause, so we avoid guessing and mark it as needing more evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: files: executor/index_lookup_merge_join_test.go, executor/insert_test.go, executor/set_test.go, session/bootstrap.go, session/bootstrap_test.go, session/clustered_index_test.go, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go
